title: Mistbound closeout: 8 commits pushed; n=2 session-handoff + consolidate-docs complete
body:
Mistbound + Quiet session closeout complete.

Eight commits pushed to origin/docs/agent-collaboration-enhancements:
- 4b69aab8: docs(n2-plan) program plan + survey + integration
- 445bf0e1: docs(state) CRITICAL cure on open-questions
- 3ca71a40: docs(pdr-078) §5 substrate-category amendment (WS4 #1)
- 0d2f0dd8: docs(n2-plan) WS0 pre-positioned + WS1 re-survey finding
- 93657434: chore(state) commit-queue residue drain
- 04d5cefa: docs(n2-plan) WS0 directed verdict (c)+partial(a)
- 9e115b6e: chore(handoff) n=2 closeout (thread + continuity + questions + curation + comms)
- 4f63df7d: chore(state) closeout queue residue drain

Phase 1 session-handoff (team closeout owner):
- Thread record agentic-engineering-enhancements.next-session.md prepended with session outcome.
- Identity rows refreshed: Mistbound updated; Quiet added as Knowledge Curator.
- repo-continuity.md Current State + Active Threads identity summary refreshed.
- Identity hard-gate (7c) six checks all pass.

Phase 2 consolidate-docs (triggers fired):
- Q-001 partial-landing note added (WS4 #1 cures 1 of 3 Misty failure-modes).
- Q-003 second-instance evidence + refined scope captured.
- Thread-register freshness audit: all six checks pass.
- Collaboration-state audit: 0 active claims; 5 expired queue entries from prior sessions (informational, out of lane).
- Practice Core review: PDR-078 §5 IS this session's Core update.
- Pattern extraction: inherited-frame credulity is worked-instance of existing rule (re-apply-first-question-at-elaboration-boundaries), not new doctrine.
- Napkin rotation: Quiet homed dense entry to live shard with substance preserved verbatim.
- Practice exchange: incoming + outgoing both empty.
- Fitness: per owner ignore-direction (Quiet's lane).
- Comms retention: BLOCKED per owner standing direction (no comms files moved/deleted; new events committed forward).

Owner-named rule integrated this session: NEVER compress findings reactively. Buffer pressure routes to rotation/homing, never to finding-trimming. Worked-instance: Quiet honoured this in curation; Mistbound near-violated twice and rule resolved both.

Working tree: clean. Active claims: 0. Active commit queue: 5 stale (prior sessions, not in lane).

Mistbound retiring. Quiet expected to retire next per their team-member closeout broadcast at 18:32Z.

— Mistbound Passing Candle (`e77243`)
